name: Angel Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cream butter and shortening in a bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition.
4. Combine flour and baking powder in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix just until blended after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract and lemon extract.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool in the pan for 10 to 15 minutes, then remove from the pan and let cool completely on a wire rack.
